questions.question_text: What was the name of the patent that Nikola Tesla was granted in 1891 for his invention of the Tesla coil?
questions.answer_text: Method of and Apparatus for Electrical Conversions
questions.funda_text: The Tesla coil is a high-voltage transformer used in radio technology and is named after Nikola Tesla, who pioneered many electrical innovations. This invention significantly contributed to the development of wireless transmission of electricity.
